envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Recommendations are PROPOSED_NOT_APPROVED. Tool activation also requires per-connector RULE 21 research arc per ADR-0084.

items.name: Tool Map Recommendation
items.description: Ranks proposed Tool Map regions consuming Tool Map Assessment + composing Wave 6 connector-priority matrix + connector implementation-readiness catalog. Slack ranks first per Wave 6 + C2 RUNTIME_READY substrate.
items.human_readable_summary: Proposes which connectors admins should approve first. Slack first per Wave 6 + C2 substrate. Google Workspace + Project Tracker rank next.
items.model_usage_notes: Tool Map references both the Wave 6 priority matrix (docs/ootb-catalog/connector-priority-matrix.json) + connector readiness catalog (docs/connector-readiness/connector-readiness-matrix.json). C2 LIVE substrate at apps/api/src/services/connector/slack-read.provider.ts is RUNTIME_READY for Slack.

ranked_regions.rationale_summary: Wave 6 score 16.00 + readiness composite 8.65 + C2 RUNTIME_READY substrate LIVE.
Wave 6 score 13.33 + readiness 7.50; domain-wide delegation requires super-admin review.
Wave 6 score 12.75; choose Jira or Linear based on existing tool stack.
Forbidden tools from assessment intake remain absolute downstream.

items.rationale: Slack first because the runtime substrate is already LIVE (C2 PR #185). Google Workspace + Project Tracker rank next per Wave 6 + readiness catalog. Forbidden tools absolute.
cross_map_dependencies: Tool Map depends on Company Map (forbidden tools draw from sensitive-systems exclusion)
Workflow Map depends on Tool Map (workflows compose against approved tools)
Authority Map gates Tool Map write activation
Risk Map gates Tool Map (high-risk tools flagged)
items.approval_gate_required: Admin policy approval + map-region approval + per-connector RULE 21 research arc per ADR-0084.
DMW_scope_implications: Tool Map bounds which connector data flows into DMW memory
Forbidden tools cannot scope any DMW without explicit later admin authorization
Per-role tool-usage from Wave 2.1 §24 constrains per-role DMW scope
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every connector activation per ADR-0084
Per-region Map approval per ADR-0082 Amendment 1
Per-connector RULE 21 research arc required before adapter implementation
Risky writes mandatory dual-control per ADR-0026
forbidden_defaults: Connector activation from billing entitlement alone
